ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1601. He was also member of Accademia dei Letterati in Rome, and Accademia Olimpica in Vicenza. His portrait is taken from Tomasini, Illustrium virorum elogia (1630)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
